title: Root Inc (ROOT) Q4 2024 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: Root Inc is scheduled to announce its Q4 2024 earnings on February 26, 2025. Key expectations include Q4 2024 Revenue of $290.99 million and Q4 2024 EPS of -$0.45 per share. For the full year 2024, revenue was expected to be $1.14 billion with earnings of $0.07 per share. Root significantly beat expectations when it reported. The company posted an earnings per share of $1.30, a stark contrast to the forecasted loss of $0.52, and revenue reached $326.7 million against a forecast of $291.34 million. Root Inc. achieved its first full year of net income profitability in 2024, with a GAAP net income of $31 million. The company achieved a gross combined ratio of 95% and wrote $1.3 billion in gross premiums, with policies in force growing by 21% year-over-year, totaling 414,000. Looking ahead, revenue is forecast to grow 11% per annum on average during the next 3 years, compared to a 5.2% growth forecast for the Insurance industry in the US.
